content:
MODULE: cosmos.health.models
FILE: cosmos/health/models.py (571 lines)
CATEGORY: health

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Health Data Models

Comprehensive data models for health tracking including metrics, nutrition,
documents, and AI recommendations.

CLASSES:
- MetricType(Enum): Types of health metrics that can be tracked.
- AlertSeverity(Enum): Severity levels for health alerts.
- MealType(Enum): Types of meals.
- GoalStatus(Enum): Status of a health goal.
- DocumentType(Enum): Types of health documents that can be parsed.
- HealthMetricReading: A single health metric reading with timestamp and metadata.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- DailySummary: Aggregated daily health statistics.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- HealthGoal: A health goal with progress tracking.
  Methods: def progress_percent(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- HealthAlert: A health alert for anomalies or important notifications.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- NutrientInfo: Nutritional information for a food item.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def scale(self, factor: float) -> 'NutrientInfo'
- FoodItem: A food item in the database.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- MealEntry: A logged meal entry.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- Recipe: A recipe with nutritional information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- LabResult: A parsed lab test result.
  Methods: def is_abnormal(self) -> bool
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- Prescription: A parsed prescription.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- HealthRecommendation: An AI-generated health recommendation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- UserHealthProfile: User health profile with preferences and restrictions.
  Methods: def age(self) -> Optional[int]
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
